original_image_tags: Aged, light blue-gray document page, oriented vertically. Two rectangular paper reinforcements with punched holes are affixed at the top edge. The page shows faint, reversed text ghosting through from the other side, primarily visible in the upper and middle sections. Several stamped markings are present in the lower half.

elements.description: The page shows the back of a document with two punched holes at the top. Faint, reversed typed text is visible through the paper, but there are no distinct visual elements. A red ink stamp at the bottom right reads 'COMMUNICATIONS SECTION MAILED 12 JUL 1 1946 P.M.' and includes the text 'U.S. ATTORNEY GENERAL FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION'. A blue ink stamp on the left side reads 'RECEIVED - MAIL ROOM DEPT OF JUSTICE JUL 1 12:35 PM '46'.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific, verbatim text from two stamps (including dates, names, and department titles) that Description A does not mention at all, creating a major factual inconsistency on the visual content.
